overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes-Benz Actros truck cabin driving through snowy urban streets at night in a truck simulator game. The journey progresses from a built-up residential area through open roads and ends at a gas station, with snow continuously falling and accumulating on the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered urban residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: yellow van passes on the left side traveling in the opposite direction
truck drives over a marked pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through snow-covered urban streets at moderate speed, navigating past other vehicles and intersections

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving in the opposite direction passes by the truck

entered.detail: multi-story residential buildings with snow accumulation on roofs lining both sides of the street
tall lamp posts casting yellow-orange light on the snowy road surface
zebra crossing markings visible on the asphalt under the snow

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the truck driving through a snow-covered urban residential area at night. Apartment buildings line both sides of the street, illuminated by street lamps. A yellow van passes in the opposite direction, and the truck continues over a pedestrian crosswalk as snow falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge or causeway with metal guardrails

events.description: transition from urban street to elevated bridge section with metal guardrails

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while transitioning from the built-up area onto a bridge or causeway section

entered.detail: metal safety barriers running along the sides of the elevated bridge section
traffic sign visible in the distance on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck leaves the dense urban area and transitions onto an elevated bridge or causeway. Metal guardrails appear on both sides, replacing the buildings. The road continues to be covered in snow, and street lights are now positioned on the left side as the truck moves onto the open structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural road with snow banks and scattered trees

events.description: truck navigates a gentle right curve in the road

agents.ego_description: driving along a curving open road surrounded by snow-covered landscape, maintaining control on the slippery surface

entered.detail: high piles of plowed snow lining both sides of the rural road
snow-covered trees visible in the distance against the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: The truck continues onto an open rural road section, leaving the bridge behind. High snow embankments line both sides of the road, and snow-covered trees are visible in the distance. The road curves gently to the right as the truck progresses through the wintry landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station approach and entry area

events.description: approaching and entering the illuminated gas station area
truck slows down and turns right toward the fuel pumps

agents.ego_description: slowing down and maneuvering into the gas station, preparing to stop at the fuel pumps

entered.detail: illuminated gas station structure with bright lights and canopy visible
gasoline dispensers under the station canopy becoming visible as the truck approaches
tall illuminated price sign visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a gas station visible in the distance by its bright lights. The driver slows down and turns right into the station area, pulling up toward the fuel pumps. The station building and canopy become prominent on the right side as the truck comes to a stop near the dispensers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dense, snow-covered residential neighborhood toward the bright lights of a roadside gas station. It begins by driving through an urban street lined with illuminated apartment buildings, passing a yellow van and crossing a pedestrian walkway under a steady snowfall. As the truck leaves the city, the buildings give way to metal guardrails on an elevated bridge, where the lighting shifts to a single row of street lamps on the left. The scene then opens into a rural landscape characterized by high snow embankments and distant wintry trees as the road curves gently to the right. Finally, the truck slows down and turns toward the glowing canopy of a gas station, pulling up to a stop beside the fuel pumps.
